# discord_invite (Data Source)

Fetches a single Discord invite by its code.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "discord_invite" "main" {
  code = "abcdef"
}

output "invite_uses" {
  value = data.discord_invite.main.uses
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `code` (String) Invite code.

### Read-Only

- `channel_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the channel the invite points to.
- `guild_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild the invite belongs to.
- `max_age` (Number) Duration in seconds after which the invite expires (0 never expires).
- `max_uses` (Number) Maximum number of uses (0 is unlimited).
- `temporary` (Boolean) Whether the invite grants temporary membership.
- `url` (String) Full invite URL.
- `uses` (Number) Number of times the invite has been used.
